_comment: Layer config for the demo chip. RDL is the 'problem' layer — we flag any sensitive-layer polygon that sits underneath RDL routing.

check_layers.name: BJT_marker
check_layers.why: Matched BJT pairs are extremely sensitive to mechanical/thermal asymmetry — RDL above them skews Vbe matching.

check_layers.name: diff
check_layers.why: Active devices under RDL can suffer piezo-stress shifts in threshold/beta.

check_layers.name: poly
check_layers.why: Poly resistors / matched poly under RDL can gain systematic offset.

check_layers.name: met3
check_layers.why: Top signal metal parallel to RDL with no ground shield gives capacitive coupling.
